roles.label: School Student
roles.description: School-scoped student role alias for audience targeting.

roles.label: School Teacher
roles.description: School-scoped teacher role alias for audience targeting.

roles.label: School Staff
roles.description: School-scoped staff role alias for audience targeting.

sections.name: SCHOOL
sections.description: This is the command centre of the school features.

sections.name: SCHOOL_ACADEMIC_LEDGER
sections.description: Track academic registrations, term progression, class enrollment, scores, and final academic results.

sections.name: SCHOOL_ACCOUNTS
sections.description: Manage school chart of accounts and account hierarchy.

sections.name: SCHOOL_ATTENDANCES
sections.description: This section provide the management for attendance lists.

sections.name: SCHOOL_CLASS_CYCLES
sections.description: Manage class cycle rollover and carry-forward lifecycle actions.

sections.name: SCHOOL_CLASS_ENROLLMENT_PERIODS
sections.description: Manage canonical class enrollment periods for rolling lifecycle.

sections.name: SCHOOL_CLASSES
sections.description: Add or edit classes and managing the class feature

sections.name: SCHOOL_DEPARTMENTS
sections.description: In this section we manage the departments of this school.

sections.name: SCHOOL_EXAMS
sections.description: Build, version, and manage exam/test templates, revisions, and question banks.

sections.name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_ALLOCATION
sections.description: Exam allocations, assignment generation, student add/exempt, and allocation lifecycle.

sections.name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_REVIEW
sections.description: Teacher review: assignment queue, per-student status, grading and attempt cleanup.

sections.name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_TAKING
sections.description: Student take-exam flow: list assignments, attempts, save answers, submit.

sections.name: SCHOOL_EXAMS_TEMPLATE
sections.description: Exam templates, revisions, question bank, publish, and revision copies.

sections.name: SCHOOL_GRADEBOOK
sections.description: Session grades matrix: gradebooks, quizzes, assignments, and weighted final scores.

sections.name: SCHOOL_HOLIDAYS
sections.description: To manage the holidays at school to manage the schedule of students and teachers.

sections.name: SCHOOL_PAY_RATES
sections.description: Manage pay rate profiles used for teacher and staff compensation.

sections.name: SCHOOL_PROGRAM_REGISTRATIONS
sections.description: Register students into programs, review registration records, and manage manual rollback actions.

sections.name: SCHOOL_PROGRAMS
sections.description: Manage academic programs and their registration configuration.

sections.name: SCHOOL_REPORTS
sections.description: Design report templates, assign reports to sessions, and collect report submissions.

sections.name: SCHOOL_REPORTS_ASSIGNMENT
sections.description: Manage report assignments and target scope.

sections.name: SCHOOL_REPORTS_INSTANCES
sections.description: Manage report instances, edits, and exports.

sections.name: SCHOOL_REPORTS_TEMPLATE
sections.description: Manage report templates and DOCX mappings.

sections.name: SCHOOL_SAMPLE_DATA
sections.description: Generate sample students, teachers, and staff for testing school workflows.

sections.name: SCHOOL_SCHEDULES
sections.description: Managing the schedules of teachers and students.

sections.name: SCHOOL_SESSION_STATUSES
sections.description: Define session statuses, formulas, and behavior rules used by schedules and timesheets.

sections.name: SCHOOL_SESSIONS
sections.description: To manages sessions

sections.name: SCHOOL_STAFF
sections.description: Manage school staff records and administrative assignments.

sections.name: SCHOOL_STUDENTS
sections.description: Manage student profiles, enrollment identity, and school status.

sections.name: SCHOOL_SUBJECTS
sections.description: This is the section which allows you to create different subjects/courses.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TEACHERS
sections.description: Manage teacher profiles, teaching assignments, and employment data.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TERM_REGISTRATIONS
sections.description: Register students into program terms, validate class baskets, and manage rollback of finance, academic, and roster side effects.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TERMS
sections.description: Define academic terms and semesters with lifecycle status and date windows for programs and class eligibility.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TIMESHEET_PERIODS
sections.description: Manage payroll period windows used by teacher and staff timesheets.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TIMESHEETS
sections.description: Review and submit teacher and staff timesheets, including controlled edits and approvals.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TRANSACTION_TEMPLATES
sections.description: Manage reusable school transaction and fee definition templates.

sections.name: SCHOOL_TRANSACTIONS
sections.description: Manage manual double-entry transaction journals with draft/post workflow.

sections.name: SCHOOL_WITHDRAWAL
sections.description: Manage student withdrawals from classes, terms, and programs with refund calculations and academic record updates.

dashboardEntries.label: Exams
dashboardEntries.description: Create templates, allocations, and grade attempts.

dashboardEntries.label: Transactions
dashboardEntries.description: Review school journal entries and transaction definitions.

dashboardEntries.label: Teachers
dashboardEntries.description: Manage teacher profiles and assignment details.

dashboardEntries.label: Staff
dashboardEntries.description: Manage staff records and administration settings.
